## Checklist

- [ ] Copy uses high-touch service language (offerings, plans, services — no e-commerce framing)
- [ ] Feature claims map to a docs.clientcove.io page
- [ ] No secrets, internal hostnames, or internal architecture details (public repo)
- [ ] Screenshots updated if visuals changed
- [ ] Reviewed on mobile widths
